title: Midnight Cardamom Bittersweet Pancakes
description: Warm cardamom-infused pancakes with a hint of bittersweet flavor, topped with creamy goodness.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, cardamom powder, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, and melted creamy butter.
3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
4. Fold in the bitter chocolate chips.
5. Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
6. Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet or griddle.
7. Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
8. Flip and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
9. Serve with midnight blueberry syrup drizzled on top.
